test_cases.prompt: I want a reference note for 'agentic tools', prompted by resources/ai-for-ux-guide.md
test_cases.expected_output: Runs a real discussion (not a one-shot proposal), grounds against the named resource, gates on explicit confirmation of the definition, writes a new reference note with type/created/sources frontmatter, flips the seeds row to type=reference with a renamed slug matching the new file.

test_cases.prompt: a second, different resource also mentions 'agentic tools' - extend the existing note
test_cases.expected_output: Does not create a second reference note or attempt to rename the new seeds row's slug to match the existing one; instead extends the existing file, adds a links row with rel_type='extends', keeps the new row's original slug unchanged, adds the new resource to the sources frontmatter array.

assertions.query: SELECT count(*) FROM links WHERE rel_type='extends' AND target_id LIKE '%agentic%'
SELECT count(*) FROM seeds WHERE type='reference' AND note_path LIKE '%agentic-tools%'

test_cases.prompt: I want a reference note for 'agentic tools' — .slipbox/config.json does not exist in this vault
test_cases.expected_output: Stops before checking for an existing note or invoking discussion, tells the user to run setup-slipbox first, writes no file.
